title: declaration of input as tri1 causes an error
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 489 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-04-24
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Source code:

```
module srffe (s, r, clk, ena, clrn, prn,q );
     input s,r,clk,ena,clrn,prn;
     output q;
     wire q;
     tri1 prn, clrn, ena;

     prim_gsrff inst (q, s, r, clk, ena, !clrn, !prn);

endmodule

```

verilator output:

```
%Error: ...: Duplicate declaration of signal: prn
%Error: ...: ... Location of original declaration

```

VCS compiles this code without complaints.
